name: UAC Bypass via CMLUA or CMSTPLUA
description: Detects the loading of CMLUA, CMSTPLUA, or CMLUAUTIL DLLs, which can be indicative of a User Account Control (UAC) bypass attempt.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the image load event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Image Load (7).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that loaded the suspicious DLL.

parameters.name: image_loaded
parameters.description: The full path to the loaded DLL (e.g., 'cmlua.dll', 'cmstplua.dll', 'cmluautil.dll').

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
